required_contains.text: ## A Proxy Type Bounds Authority by Amount and Immediacy
Beyond naming a permission category, a proxy type can also limit the size and the timing of what a
proxy may do. The working-with-proxies guidance notes that a SmallTransfer proxy only authorizes
transfer amounts that do not exceed 0.5 TAO, whereas the most permissive case is a proxy with type
Any and a delay of zero, which can immediately perform any operation on behalf of the safe wallet.
The configured delay is the counterweight to that reach: a non-zero delay creates a window during
